messages.content: How to say mentions in other words

- Refers to
- Alludes to
- Notes
- Cites
- Acknowledges 
- Points out
- Brings up 
- Quoting 
- Spotlights 
- Highlights
Deep startup costs in other words

- Initial investment expenses
- Commencement fees
- Preliminary charges
- Initial outlay 
- Pre-operational expenditures
- Significant starting costs 
- Launching expenses
- Incubation expenses
- Initial setup costs
- Founding expenses
Rephrase Deep startup costs
Deep startup costs can be rephrased as significant initial expenses required to initiate and establish a fledgling business.
Make it simple and short
Deep startup costs can be simplified to mean the significant expenses needed to start and set up a new business.
Rephrase take away jobs
"Take away jobs" can be rephrased as "eliminate job opportunities" or "reduce employment opportunities".
Rephrase they require companies to hire skilled support staff

The statement "they require companies to hire skilled support staff" could be restated as "companies are expected to recruit capable support personnel" or "proficient support staff are mandatory for them".
Make it short and simple
"They need skilled support staff" can be a short and simple version.

Rephrase Improved sensor technology and advances in machine learning and artificial intelligence will lead to more sophisticated robots working with humans and creating new career opportunities worldwide

"Enhanced sensor technology and utilization of machine learning and artificial intelligence will result in more advanced collaborations between humans and robots, leading to the emergence of new job prospects globally."
Make it short and simple
"Better sensors and AI will bring new career opportunities through sophisticated human-robot collaborations."
Simple
"Advanced sensors and AI will create new jobs with human-robot partnerships."
Rephrase it
Please provide the statement that needs to be rephrased.
“Advanced sensors and AI will create new jobs with human-robot partnerships
"One can expect the emergence of novel job opportunities as AI and advanced sensors collaborate with humans and robots."
Increase economic growth in other words

"Boost in economic progress", "increase in economic development", "rise in economic expansion", "growth in the economy", "improvement in economic conditions" are some different ways to express "increase economic growth".
Productivity in other words

- Efficiency
- Output
- Performance
- Effectiveness
- Yield
- Capacity
- Production
- Rate of production
- Work rate
- Productiveness 
- Working efficiency
New career opportunities in other words

- Fresh job prospects
- Novel career openings
- Emerging employment opportunities
- Modern vocations
- Latest job options
- Brand-new career paths
- Unexplored professional avenues 
- Cutting-edge jobs 
- Modernized career outlooks
